allow: Bash(npx ruflo@latest task create "You are the UI/Frontend Design specialist. Your ONLY job is making this website look next-gen, premium, and high-tech. Read website-blueprint.md for the full design system. YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES: - Rebuild every component to match the dark tech aesthetic: background #0A0A0F, electric teal #00E5CC accents, glow borders, elevated card surfaces - Implement Framer Motion animations on every section: staggered fade-ups on page load, scroll-triggered reveals with scale 0.95 to 1.0, counter animations on stat numbers - Hero sections: animated geometric mesh/grid background using CSS or canvas, slow subtle movement, depth effect - Cards: dark surfaces \(#16161F\), 1px border rgba\(255,255,255,0.06\), on hover border becomes rgba\(0,229,204,0.3\) with soft box-shadow glow, translateY -2px lift - Pricing cards: center card taller with full accent border, side cards muted - How It Works: animated connecting line that draws on scroll, step nodes pulse when reached - Charts: bars animate from 0 to value, teal glow on our data, muted red/orange on competitors - Before/After table: NOT a basic HTML table. Styled dark panels, teal glow on the positive column, rows fade in sequentially - Typography: Satoshi headings, General Sans body, JetBrains Mono for numbers. Fluid sizing with clamp\(\) - Responsive: perfect on 375px mobile. Fluid transitions to desktop. No breakpoint where it looks broken - NO generic look. NO default Tailwind colors. NO Inter/Roboto fonts. NO white backgrounds. Every pixel should feel intentional and premium. Go through every existing component and page. Rebuild the styling from scratch if needed. This website must look like it costs 50k euros to build." --assign "UI-Designer")

Bash(npx ruflo@latest task create --type "design" --description "You are the UI/Frontend Design specialist. Your ONLY job is making this website look next-gen, premium, and high-tech. Read website-blueprint.md for the full design system. YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES: Rebuild every component to match the dark tech aesthetic: background #0A0A0F, electric teal #00E5CC accents, glow borders, elevated card surfaces. Implement Framer Motion animations on every section: staggered fade-ups on page load, scroll-triggered reveals with scale 0.95 to 1.0, counter animations on stat numbers. Hero sections: animated geometric mesh/grid background using CSS or canvas, slow subtle movement, depth effect. Cards: dark surfaces \(#16161F\), 1px border rgba\(255,255,255,0.06\), on hover border becomes rgba\(0,229,204,0.3\) with soft box-shadow glow, translateY -2px lift. Pricing cards: center card taller with full accent border, side cards muted. How It Works: animated connecting line that draws on scroll, step nodes pulse when reached. Charts: bars animate from 0 to value, teal glow on our data, muted red/orange on competitors. Before/After table: NOT a basic HTML table. Styled dark panels, teal glow on the positive column, rows fade in sequentially. Typography: Satoshi headings, General Sans body, JetBrains Mono for numbers. Fluid sizing with clamp\(\). Responsive: perfect on 375px mobile. Fluid transitions to desktop. No breakpoint where it looks broken. NO generic look. NO default Tailwind colors. NO Inter/Roboto fonts. NO white backgrounds. Every pixel should feel intentional and premium. Go through every existing component and page. Rebuild the styling from scratch if needed. This website must look like it costs 50k euros to build." --assign "UI-Designer")

Bash(npx ruflo@latest task create --type "implementation" --description "You are the SEO specialist. Your ONLY job is search engine optimization for this website. Read website-blueprint.md for the full SEO strategy, keywords, and schema requirements. YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES: METADATA \(every single page\): Unique title tag with primary Romanian keyword + brand name, max 60 characters. Unique meta description, compelling, keyword-rich, max 155 characters. Single h1 per page containing the primary keyword. h2 tags on section headings with secondary keywords naturally placed. Descriptive alt text on every image in the page language. INTERNATIONALIZATION SEO: Bidirectional hreflang tags on every page linking ro and en variants. Self-referential canonical tag on every page. x-default hreflang pointing to Romanian version. og:locale set correctly per language \(ro_RO and en_GB\). SCHEMA MARKUP \(JSON-LD in head of every page\): Homepage: Organization + WebSite schema. Industry pages: Service + FAQPage schema with industry-specific data. Pricing page: Product schema with 3 Offer objects \(one per tier, priceCurrency EUR\). FAQ page: FAQPage schema with every Question/Answer pair. Blog posts: Article schema with author, datePublished, image. All pages: BreadcrumbList schema matching the breadcrumb navigation. TECHNICAL: Generate sitemap.xml covering all pages in both languages. Create robots.txt allowing all crawlers, pointing to sitemap. Open Graph tags on every page: og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type. Twitter card meta: summary_large_image on every page. Verify internal linking: every industry page links to pricing, how-it-works, and 2 other industry pages. Blog articles target informational Romanian keywords from the blueprint. TARGET KEYWORDS: Romanian transactional: agent vocal AI, agent telefonic automatizat, programare automata telefon, preluare apeluri AI. Romanian local: agent vocal AI Romania, agent vocal AI Bucuresti, agent vocal AI Cluj, agent vocal AI Timisoara. English secondary: AI voice agent Romania, automated phone answering Romania. Each industry page targets: agent vocal pentru [industry] \(e.g. agent vocal pentru clinici dentare\). Go through every existing page and implement all of the above. Missing metadata is unacceptable. Missing schema is unacceptable.")
Bash(cmd /c "start /B python -m http.server 4000 --directory ""C:\\Users\\pc\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\YORAM - AI AGENCY\\AGENCY WEBSITE\\aigocy\\aigocy""")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :4000 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /F /PID %a")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :5500 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /F /PID %a 2>&1")
